heading: Sunday
text: Any early fog giving way to mostly sunny skies. Highs in the low to mid 80s. Light and variable wind.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly clear. Chance of patchy river valley fog. Lows from the upper 50s to low 60s. Calm wind.

heading: Monday
text: Any early fog giving way to mostly sunny skies. Highs in the 80s, nearing 90 in the warmer valleys. Wind turning southwest near 10 mph.
